title: Canada Carbon Rebate (CCR) calculation sheet for the 2024 base year for residents of Prince Edward Island (April 2025 amounts) - Canada.ca

## Canada Carbon Rebate (CCR) calculation sheet for the 2024 base year for residents of Prince Edward Island (April 2025 amounts)

## Jurisdictional basic benefit
Note : The amount for PEI includes the 20 per cent rural supplement, as all residents are eligible.
